name: Sky-High Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Corn, whole kernel; cooked, cold
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked rice, corn, celery, green pepper, olives, onion, dill pickle, salt, black pepper to taste, curry powder, chutney, and French dressing.
2. Pour over the salad and stir gently.
3. Chill until serving time.
4. Mound on crisp salad greens.
5. Garnish with slices of hard-cooked eggs.
